home.intro: This app is a simple utility tool to help you paying Lightning invoices on devices/platforms that do not directly support BoltCards, such as websites, custom machines, and others.
home.walletIntro: With "Wallet Mode" you can send or receive funds from one Bolt Card to another.
home.foundInvoiceClipboard: Tap to read invoice from your clipboard

invoice.label: Label
invoice.scheduledSwapIntro:
This invoice is Onchain only.
To pay it seamlessly with your Bolt Card, Swiss Bitcoin Pay provide a cheap swap service (0.21% fee + miner fee*).

* If you schedule the sats to be sent with our next batch, miner fee will be free for you.

wallet.title: Enter amount (SATs)
wallet.tapYourBoltCard: Tap your Bolt Card to initialize the wallet.
wallet.tapYourBoltCardReceive: Tap your Bolt Card to receive.
